name: Ruined Portal Overhaul
description:
Ruined Portal Overhaul transforms every overworld ruined portal encounter into a Massive Portal Dungeon: a radius-136 corrupted scar with outer contamination, a nether-warped middle zone, a ritual portal platform, organic portal-zone monsters, anchored ghasts, ambient pre-raid spawners, loot chests, and a deep corrupted cave system with connected tunnels, lava runs, a lava lake, an altar, and deeper treasure.

Explorers who enter the approach zone feel the portal stir. Wearing a full set of gold armor near the frame awakens the Gold Tribute Raid. Five escalating waves of Piglin Illager variants attack with crossbows, axes, illusions, ravagers, evocation magic, boss-bar progress, inter-wave warnings, ring-based spawns, server-side corruption atmosphere, dramatic raid audio, and Hard-mode combat upgrades.

Completing the raid lights the generated frame into a functional Nether portal, disables the pre-raid spawners, spawns a boss reward chest, and summons the Exiled Piglin Trader for a short-lived gold-based reward shop. The system tracks completion per portal location so each dungeon becomes a one-time survival challenge rather than a repeatable farm.
